name: Boss is mad I filed work injury claim, can he fire me in Sandy?
description: Illegal to fire for filing—document and report.

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed work injury claim, can he fire me in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal to fire for filing—document and report.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, retaliation is illegal under Utah/Idaho law; protected from firing/demotion for claiming benefits. Key factors: Document threats; file complaint if punished. At-will exceptions apply here. Report to labor dept; attorney handles retaliation suit.
